title: Claustrophobia — Richard
body: Richard has mild claustrophobia. Avoid: small aircraft (propeller planes, helicopters), tight interior spaces, small elevators. Affects transfer planning and room selection.

title: SEVERE Tree Nut Allergy
body: Sofia has a severe tree nut allergy and carries an EpiPen at all times. ALL properties must confirm allergen-free dining options before booking is confirmed. Request allergy card in local language for every destination. This is a life-threatening condition — not a preference.

title: Six Senses — 12% Commission Incentive
body: Six Senses running 12% advisor commission incentive through June 2026 (standard is 10%). Sofia's highest-rated trip was Six Senses Bumthang (Bhutan). Proactively recommend Six Senses properties for her next wellness trip.

title: Fatima — Diabetes & Mobility
body: Fatima Al-Rashid (Nadia's mother, age 75) has diabetes requiring low-glycemic meal options communicated to hotels in advance. She also uses a wheelchair for distances over 200m and requires ground-floor or elevator-accessible rooms. All properties must confirm accessibility before booking.

title: ACC Scientific Sessions — New Orleans, Nov 2026
body: Anya mentioned she is keynoting at ACC Scientific Sessions in New Orleans, November 2026. Her typical lead time for conference travel is ~3 months. Proactively send hotel options in August 2026.

title: Peninsula — 12% Advisor Incentive
body: The Peninsula Hotels running 12% advisor commission incentive through December 2026. Anya stayed at Peninsula Chicago (Nov 2025) and rated it 4/5. Worth recommending for future conference cities with Peninsula presence (Chicago, NYC, Paris, Hong Kong, Tokyo, Bangkok, London, Istanbul).
